name: snooze-1h-updates-state-and-sets-until
description: handleSnooze('1h') must (a) set state='held', (b) write snoozed_until ~1h in the future into metadata. Regression guard for the snooze button path.

db.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND state = 'held'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND CAST(json_extract(metadata, '$.snoozed_until') AS INTEGER) > strftime('%s','now')*1000
